philippines.title: NBA Rising Stars: UST-SHS braces for tough test vs Australia
philippines.description:
SINGAPORE—After a dominant debut in the 2026 NBA Rising Stars Invitational, UST-SHS knows a far tougher challenge awaits. Fresh off a 75-45 rout of Mongolia’s Royal International School on Wednesday at OCBC Arena, the Junior Growling Tigresses now turn their attention to Australia’s Rowville Secondary College in their final Group B assignment. Coach Aresnio Dysangco said there will be little time to celebrate with just a day to prepare for the taller Australian side. “From now until tomorrow, we’ll go to the tapes and watch the game of Australia and try to see what we can do strategically, if there […]...
Keep on reading: NBA Rising Stars: UST-SHS braces for tough test vs Australia

philippines.title: One-stop shops eyed for semiconductor, water projects
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines – The Anti-Red Tape Authority (Arta) is expanding its sector-specific one-stop shop to semiconductors and water projects to streamline permits and accelerate investments. Arta Director General Ernesto Perez said the agency targets the semiconductor one-stop shop in October, while the water-project counterpart is still pending Malacañang’s approval. READ: E-business one-stop shops eyed for a hundred more LGUs in 2025 These sectors will be the latest covered by Arta’s one-stop shop framework, which consolidates and digitizes permitting and clearance processes. “Our efforts so far are working in terms of ensuring that we prioritize sectors, and then come up with […]...
Keep on reading: One-stop shops eyed for semiconductor, water projects

philippines.title: From Gilas to FEU, Prince Cariño shrugs off fatigue in NBA tilt
philippines.description:
SINGAPORE—Playing in two different tournaments representing the Philippines and his school, Far Eastern University-Diliman, just nine days apart, fatigue is the least of Prince Cariño’s concerns. Shortly after helping Gilas Pilipinas boys win gold in the Fiba U18 Asia Cup Seaba Qualifiers in Thailand, Cariño was back on the court again, this time for FEU in the NBA Rising Stars Invitational in Singapore. Yet, he showed no signs of slowing down in the Baby Tamaraws’ 89-24 rout of Hwa Chong Institution at OCBC Arena on Tuesday night. Last night, Prince Cariño popped off for 21 points and seven rebounds in […]...
Keep on reading: From Gilas to FEU, Prince Cariño shrugs off fatigue in NBA tilt

energy.description: Adani Group, the conglomerate of Indian billionaire Gautam Adani, could become India’s biggest private nuclear power capacity developer within a decade, targeting 10 gigawatts (GW) by 2035, as India opened its civil nuclear power sector to private investment.  “Our entry into nuclear energy through Adani Atomic Energy is another confident step towards securing India's long-term energy future,” Gautam Adani said at the annual general meeting of Adani Group on Wednesday.  “With land identified and a 10 GW targeted…

energy.title: China’s Teapot Refineries Cut Operations to Their Lowest Level Since 2017
energy.description: The independent refiners in China, the so-called teapots, have slashed their refinery run rates to the lowest level since 2017, as high feedstock prices, weak domestic fuel consumption, and restricted exports have hit margins. Refinery runs at the refiners in the Shandong province slumped to just 50.5% last week, per data from consultancy JLC cited by Bloomberg. These run rates are even lower than in 2020, when the pandemic hit China’s fuel consumption. The current utilization rates are at the lowest level since August 2017, when the independent…
